# Retirement / Freeze + Lessons-Learned — <STRATEGY_ID>

> YL-004 template. Produced when a strategy moves to `frozen` or `retired` (docs/07). Retirement is a
> normal, honest lifecycle outcome — capture the lessons so they compound. Cross-refs: docs/07, docs/11,
> docs/adr/ADR-YL-008.

## Subject
- **strategy_id / card:** `<SC-XXXX>` · **prior status:** `<>` · **new status:** `<frozen | retired>`
- **decision owner + date:** `<name + date>`

## Why (the reason)
- **trigger:** `<superseded | capacity gone | thesis dead | sustained underperformance | risk flag |
  invariant conflict | unexplained-spread (ADR-YL-008) | breach>`
- **one-paragraph narrative:** `<what happened>`
- **snapshot at decision:** `realized spread over floor <bps> · drawdown <> · evidence level <>`

## Lessons learned (the durable output)
- **what the thesis got right:** `<>`
- **what broke / the most-fragile assumption:** `<>`
- **spread-attribution lesson (ADR-YL-008):** `was the spread ever fully explained? where did the
  unpriced risk hide? <>`
- **what to watch for in similar candidates:** `<reusable red flag>`
- **feeds/monitoring gaps this exposed:** `<>`

## Disposition
- **positions:** `<held-only (frozen, no increase) | fully exited (retired) | N/A (advisory/paper)>`
- **can it reopen?** `<conditions that would justify revisiting, or "terminal">`
- **refusal-log entry written?** `<yes/no + reason code>` (unexplained-spread retirements are positive results)

## Provenance
- **created_at:** `<ISO-8601 UTC>` · **reviewer:** `<name>`
